docket_entries.description: CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 26404, RECORD TRANSFERRED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KEYES, ELIMUEL AS TO DEFENDANT HUTCHINS, SHEILA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-28-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOT A LICENSED CONTRACTOR AT THE TIME WORK WAS PERFORMED. (IT HAS BEEN ADVISED BY THE CALIFORNIA CONTRACTOR'S STATE LICENSING BOARD THAT)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KEYES, ELIMUEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUTCHINS, SHEILA $2,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $48.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,048.00, ALTHOUGH NOT A BASIS FOR THIS RULING, THE COURT NOTES THAT DEFT. CONTRARY TO HER TESTIMONY, WAS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT HUTCHINS, SHEILA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KEYES, ELIMUEL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HUTCHINS, SHEILA JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 26404 ON 10-26-00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HUTCHINS, SHEILA
